title: Prison sans barreaux
writer: Hans Wilhelm, Gina Kaus, Otto Eis
actors: Annie Ducaux, Roger Duchesne, Ginette Leclerc
plot: In a state correctional institute for teenage girls, Madame Appel, the superintendent, rules with an iron fist. The State appoints thirty-year-old Yvonne to evaluate the situation. The young woman is convinced that the girls shoul...
